title: 将microgpt移植到Futhark，第一部分
title_en: Porting microgpt to Futhark, Part I
summary: 本文介绍了将microgpt（一个轻量级GPT实现）移植到Futhark（一种数据并行函数式编程语言）的过程。作者详细描述了移植中的技术挑战和优化策略，展示了如何在GPU上高效运行小型语言模型。This article describes the process of porting microgpt, a lightweight GPT implementation, to Futhark, a data-parallel functional programming language. The author details technical challenges and optimization strategies, demonstrating how to efficiently run small language models on GPUs.
